data.title: 国际服叶渚角色曲「It Will Be Alright」MV公开 & 网页活动青辉石礼物
data.summary: [It Will Be Alright Music Video Release] Sensei, are you enjoying the Valkyrie Blues Webview Event?
data.body:
[It Will Be Alright Music Video Release]

Sensei, are you enjoying the Valkyrie Blues Webview Event?
Bask in Kanna's vibes even more with her music video "It Will Be Alright," out now! In celebration of the release, we've prepared a special gift! Please log in to claim it! 💌

🎵Music Video: https://youtu.be/Ryv-5z1ifzY
🗓️Gift Claim Period: 12/27 (Fri) 3:00 AM – 1/3 (Fri) 2:59 PM (UTC)
💎Gift: Pyroxene x600

#BlueArchive
